dd_blindspot_1q.note: DD blind spot is K-level: filter function ALSO sees F0=0 at symmetric echo. PDET does not claim this as new; it adds readout-level invisibility + finite-shot.

dd_blindspot_2q_control_echo.note: Control-echo (pi-X on q0) averages K_ZI AND K_ZZ to 0 (a realistic ZZ spectator coherent error hidden from ALL measurements). Breaking the echo (during-gate control change) exposes them -- a genuine MULTI-QUBIT control-design knob. IX/IZ on the target are unaffected (not echoed).

pdet_delta_vs_filter_function.K_level_invisibility: captured by BOTH filter functions and PDET (DD blind spot). NOT a PDET novelty.
pdet_delta_vs_filter_function.readout_level_invisibility: K!=0 but invisible under restricted (S,O); PDET catches, filter functions MISS.
pdet_delta_vs_filter_function.finite_shot_cost: PDET returns detection shot budget N* (FA/MISS); filter functions give spectral sensitivity.
pdet_delta_vs_filter_function.unified_workflow: PDET = kernel over the dictionary under real (S,O) + minimal control/readout augmentation.
